---
title: "Hi, I'm Egor 👋"
---

Welcome to my portfolio. I'm a data science student passionate about 
building things that work — and understanding why they do.

## Featured Visualization

Below is an interactive demo built with Shiny for Python, 
demonstrating OOP-based data generation and charting.

<iframe 
  src="https://YOUR_POSIT_URL_HERE" 
  width="100%" 
  height="600px" 
  frameborder="0">
</iframe>

> Replace the iframe src with your Posit Connect Cloud URL after deploying the Shiny app.
